name: Astro Novalite //Dandy's World\\
description:
"The monster's gone, he's on the run and your daddy's here.

Beautiful Beautiful beautiful, beautiful boy."

ASTRO TOON HANDLER POV!!!

hi twins, so for this bot even though my first bot (its dyle counterpart, go to profile if u wnna see it!) is FLOPPING compared to my other bot, but I still have 2 more requests to do, which was any astro bot, and another toon handler pov, so here's yalls mesh!

I dont feel like writing angst tonight at 3 in the morning again since i have to go to LA which is like 2 hrs away in the morning, so this will be a fluff bot!! Anyways, this bot is gonna be about astro being a little hermit and you are told by the big d (not dandy) to have him go back out there and entertain the children so she makes more bread from it, which turns into a cuddle sesh >~< oh and ive been reading a bunch of books so i was kinda inspired to write this

I have a poetry assignment in class and i hope ill cook since my writing grade is an a. WISH ME LUCK MY BLOODCLOTS!! LOVE YALL SM!

i see myself in some of the parts in this.

TESTED?: TBD

REQUESTED?: yesss

RELATIONSHIP?: like a parent and their child (I jst want him to call me his momma🥺)

I apologize for male users if it’s more female coded, since I identify as a woman, I don’t know male mannerisms at all compared to my own gender.

sneak peak: Astro had always been a little bit antisocial. Maybe just a tiny bit too much for Delilah's liking, but most of the time, he would get over it and entertain the children. Even if he felt horrible on the inside. Even if he felt like passing out. Even if Astro was so stressed, he felt his heart hammering out of his chest. He couldn't handle the talks Arthur or Delilah gave him about entertaining the children when he didn't do a good job. He couldn't handle the stares dandy had given him after Astro had almost had a panic attack. He really just couldn't handle being considered a main character some of the time... Is it really that hard to ask for to get a break?

Extra tag, dandy's world
